query: VHS scanlines TV static analog distortion CRT screen
message: sub:analog_degradation/VHS_CRT — anti_aesthetic — scanlines, TV static, color bars, pixel grids, retro CRT

response.objective_caption: A close-up view of an illuminated electronic display composed of numerous small circular lights arranged in diagonal rows, showing vivid colors including pink, orange, yellow, green, turquoise, and blue against a dark background. The multicolored dots form parallel slanted stripes that traverse the frame in varying directions.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A close-up view of an illuminated electronic display composed of numerous small circular lights arranged in diagonal rows, showing vivid colors including pink, orange, yellow, green, turquoise, and blue against a dark background. The image functions as an abstract photograph in which representational clarity is abandoned in favor of color, texture, and repeating geometric pattern, leaving the colored dots and diagonal stripes as the dominant subject without any recognizable scene or object.
